69455.title: The Butterfly, The Harp, And The Timepiece
69455.description: A vagabond, an office worker and a former executive grasp for hope in their waning dreams through sentimental treasures at a magical pawn shop, but unlikely circumstances bind their paths together in a culmination of fulfilment and disappointment.
